generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our region's emergency preparedness drills have been cut by 30% this year. With global tensions rising, this feels like the wrong time to be reducing our readiness. Strategic autonomy isn't just about big military budgets - it's about making sure our communities can handle crises when they hit. #PublicSafetyFirst #StrongerTogether
